parameters.query: SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE plan_status IN ('active', 'trialing')

INSERT INTO daily_analytics (org_id, date, total_failed_amount, total_recovered_amount, total_failed_count, total_recovered_count, recovery_rate, retry_success_count, email_success_count, sms_success_count) SELECT '{{$json.id}}', CURRENT_DATE - 1, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status != 'ignored' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0), COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'recovered' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0), COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status != 'ignored'), COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'recovered'), CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status != 'ignored') > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'recovered')::numeric / COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status != 'ignored') * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recovery_attempts WHERE org_id = '{{$json.id}}' AND type = 'auto_retry' AND status = 'succeeded' AND DATE(executed_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 1), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recovery_attempts WHERE org_id = '{{$json.id}}' AND type = 'email' AND status = 'succeeded' AND DATE(executed_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 1), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recovery_attempts WHERE org_id = '{{$json.id}}' AND type = 'sms' AND status = 'succeeded' AND DATE(executed_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 1) FROM payment_events WHERE org_id = '{{$json.id}}' AND DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 1 ON CONFLICT (org_id, date) DO UPDATE SET total_failed_amount = EXCLUDED.total_failed_amount, total_recovered_amount = EXCLUDED.total_recovered_amount, total_failed_count = EXCLUDED.total_failed_count, total_recovered_count = EXCLUDED.total_recovered_count, recovery_rate = EXCLUDED.recovery_rate, retry_success_count = EXCLUDED.retry_success_count, email_success_count = EXCLUDED.email_success_count, sms_success_count = EXCLUDED.sms_success_count
